% fix-bank.tex - small bank exercising variable overrides on \problem.

\begin{problem}{quadratic}[topic=quad]
	\setrng{a}{2}{9}%
	\setrng{b}{2}{9}%
	\setrng{c}{2}{9}%
	Solve $\get{a}x^2 + \get{b}x + \get{c} = 0$ for $x$.
	\begin{solution}
	By the quadratic formula,
	$x = \frac{-\get{b} \pm \sqrt{\get{b}^2 - 4 \cdot \get{a} \cdot \get{c}}}{2 \cdot \get{a}}.$
	\end{solution}
\end{problem}

\begin{problem}{picky}[topic=pick]
	\pickrange{lst}{3}{1}{20}%
	Pick from the list: \getlist{lst}.
\end{problem}

% Regression: a \begin{problem}{id}[meta] header that WRAPS across lines. The
% engine serves each FR stem by re-reading the bank from the line after
% \begin{problem}, so it must skip these continuation lines; otherwise the
% trailing meta line (source=MLHEADERLEAK]) leaks in as the stem's first line.
% The smoke check asserts MULTILINEHEADEROK is present and MLHEADERLEAK absent.
\begin{problem}{mlheader}[topic=quad,
                          section=R.1,
                          source=MLHEADERLEAK]
	Multi-line header stem renders MULTILINEHEADEROK here.
\end{problem}
